---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new MCP tool, resource, or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision it working? (e.g., new tool name, input schema, expected output)

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Any examples, screenshots, or references that might help.
